subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The manifestation of the Word of God is even as the rays of the sun, which conquer the contingent world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء تجلی کلمه الله مانند پرتو آفتابست که کون وامکانرا تسخیر
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @Word of God the cause of creation, @praise and encouragement
